title: Blueprint HUD
description: Having difficulties in tracking the resources needed for your lovely build? use Blueprint HUD for tracking them easily
body:
# 📐 Blueprint HUD
Blueprint HUD is the ultimate survival and building companion for Minecraft. Whether you are gathering materials for a massive fortress or keeping track of components for complex redstone machinery, this mod provides a sleek, non-intrusive "to-do list" directly on your screen.

## ✨ Key Features
**Live Progress Tracking:** Monitor your inventory in real-time. The HUD shows exactly how many items you have versus how many you need.

**Visual Checkmarks:** Once you reach your goal, the item is struck through with a satisfying green checkmark, so you know you're ready to build.

**The Master Settings GUI:** Forget complex commands! Press 'C' to open a unified menu where you can search for any block in the game and add it to your list with a single click.

**Fully Customizable Colors:** Match your aesthetic. Use the built-in color picker or input custom Hex codes to change the bar, text, and highlight colors.

**Drag & Drop HUD:** Press 'B' to enter Edit Mode. Click and drag your list anywhere on the screen. It stays where you put it—even after restarting the game!

**Survival Balanced:** To keep things fair and immersive, dying will reset your "marked as done" progress, serving as a reminder of your lost loot.

## 🎮 Controls
[B] - Edit Mode: Drag the HUD around or click the red [X] next to items to remove them.

[C] - Settings Menu: Search/Add blocks and customize your RGB colors.

[COMMANDS] - \
**/blueprint add [block] [count]**\
**/blueprint clear [block] [count(optional)]**

## 🛠 Installation
Ensure you are using the Fabric Loader.

Drop the Blueprint HUD .jar into your mods folder.

Launch the game and start building!
